name: synaps-skills
description: Web search, browser automation, YouTube toolkit, speech-to-text, persistent memory, tmux orchestration, engineering disciplines, and skill scaffolding for Synaps CLI

plugins.name: web-tools
plugins.description: Use for any web operation — fetch, browser, search, youtube, scholar, transcribe, pdf, docs, github, wiki. Self-healing memory via VelociRAG.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Engineering discipline skills — code review, security review, TDD, debugging, spec-driven development, incremental implementation, planning, verification, worktree-based isolation, and multi-agent convergence loops. Battle-tested patterns for shipping reliable software.

plugins.name: memkoshi
plugins.description: Use to recall prior decisions, preferences, and facts before answering, and to commit new decisions during work. Persistent local-first memory across Synaps sessions via the Memkoshi CLI.

plugins.name: tmux-tools
plugins.description: Use when `$TMUX` is set to drive long-running, interactive, or streaming work in a side worker pane — installs needing sudo, log tailing, build/test daemons, parallel shells, user-injectable input.

plugins.name: plugin-maker
plugins.description: Scaffold, validate, lint, and inspect Synaps CLI plugins. Knows the full surface — manifests, skills, extensions, sidecars, settings, keybinds, commands, hooks, and the lightbox/help integration. Use when starting a new plugin, adding any feature to an existing plugin, or auditing the installed plugin set.

plugins.name: local-voice
plugins.description: Opt-in local voice dictation sidecar plugin. Owns microphone capture, VAD, and Whisper STT outside the Synaps CLI core.

plugins.name: axel-memory-manager
plugins.description: Axel — portable agent intelligence (search, memory, self-organizing knowledge) backed by VolciRAG, Memkoshi, and Consolidation. One .r8 file is the agent's entire brain.
